basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Postdoctoral Fellowship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee has released the official notification for Postdoctoral Fellowship Position posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD from Metallurgical and Materials Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/Ceramic Engineering with good quality publications. Good Knowledge on Corrosion and Wear behavior of Metallic Materials. Good Knowledge on Biomaterials and Bioimplants applications. Various materials characterization techniques for the structural and Biomaterials.
qualification.details: PhD from Metallurgical and Materials Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/Ceramic Engineering with good quality publications. Good Knowledge on Corrosion and Wear behavior of Metallic Materials. Good Knowledge on Biomaterials and Bioimplants applications. Various materials characterization techniques for the structural and Biomaterials. Candidates who have recently submitted their doctoral thesis are also eligible to apply subject to the condition that they will furnish the proof of award of PhD degree at the time of interview, if shortlisted.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.80,000/- per month (+ HRA as per rules)
salary_details.details: Fellowship Amount: Rs.80,000/- per month (+ HRA as per rules) for 11 months. Contingency: Rs.50,000/- per annum.

selection_process: Screened candidates will be called for interview in offline/online mode.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Postdoctoral Fellowship Position Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Postdoctoral Fellowship Position at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Postdoctoral Fellowship Position at IIT Roorkee is July 20, 2026. Ensure your application is submitted via email before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Postdoctoral Fellowship Position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive Rs.80,000/- per month plus HRA as per rules. Additionally, a contingency of Rs.50,000/- per annum is provided.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications for this fellowship?
faq.answer: A PhD in Metallurgical and Materials Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, or Ceramic Engineering with good publications is required. Strong knowledge in corrosion, wear behavior of metallic materials, biomaterials, bioimplants, and material characterization techniques is also essential.

faq.question: Q4. Can candidates who have submitted their thesis apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who have recently submitted their doctoral thesis are eligible, provided they can furnish proof of their PhD degree award at the time of the interview.

faq.question: Q5. How should candidates apply for this position?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates should apply via email with a cover letter, CV, publication list, and research statement in a single PDF file to Dr. Suhrit Mula at [email protected].

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this Postdoctoral Fellowship Position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the fellowship?
faq.answer: The fellowship is offered for a duration of 11 months.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Postdoctoral Fellowship Position is MME/PDF/D-1/657.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this fellowship?
faq.answer: Shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview, which may be conducted in offline or online mode.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
